Client tracker preview for Boston Lactation, LLC

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Boston Lactation, LLC: A single consult-to-reimbursement tracker for Boston Lactation's in-home, office, and virtual visits across the greater Boston service area.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC), home visits in the greater Boston Area; telehealth appointments also available, latch support, supply and intake assessment, back-to-work planning, pumping consultation, inducing lactation, tongue tie assessment, post-frenotomy care, Insurance will usually reimburse my services in full... it is always good to call them to check

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + consult view Feeding cadence + weight check view Follow-up + class enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every consult — in-home, office, or virtual — gets one record with intake, visit notes, town/travel zone, and feeding plan in one place.
  • Insurance-reimbursement status is tracked per parent so Aetna direct-bills and pay-at-visit receipts stop slipping through email threads.
  • Follow-up cadence (weight check, pumping check-in, post-frenotomy care) is queued on one timeline instead of re-booked one at a time in IntakeQ.
